title: static html build system implementation
description:
## Summary
- Replaces Docsify with a fully self-contained Node.js static site generator.
- Pre-renders Mermaid diagrams and compiles all `.md` files into zero-dependency `.html` pages.
- Integrates generation into the `Taskfile.yml` via `docs:build`.

## Test plan
- [x] task test:all
- [x] manueller Check via local HTML preview (files checked manually via structural bash test)

Co-Authored-By: Gemini-CLI
